cards.title: First Aid & Minor Surgery
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • ABCDE primary survey (A: Airway, B: Breathing, C: Circulation, D: Disability, E: Exposure)
  • BLS: 30:2 compressions:ventilations ratio
  • Anaphylaxis: IM adrenaline 0.3mg anterolateral thigh
  • Wound management: Clean, close, dress
  • Burns: Cool water 20 min, TBSA calculation (Rule of 9)
